nasb.text: At that time the Lord set apart the tribe of Levi to carry the ark of the covenant of the Lord, to stand before the Lord to serve Him and to bless in His name until this day.

esv.text: At that time the Lord set apart the tribe of Levi to carry the ark of the covenant of the Lord  to stand before the Lord to minister to him and to bless in his name, to this day.

cnv.text: 那時，耶和華把利未支派分別出來，叫他們抬耶和華的約櫃，侍立在耶和華面前事奉他，並且奉他的名祝福，直到今日。

ccb.text: 那时，耶和华把利未支派分别出来，派他们抬祂的约柜，站立在祂面前事奉祂，奉祂的名祝福，至今未变。
